original_text: Apple's revenue has shown steady growth, increasing from $394.33B in fiscal year 2022 to $416.16B in fiscal year 2025, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 4.2%. The YoY growth rate between fiscal years 2024 and 2025 was 4.4%, as calculated from the respective revenue figures (chunk_id_35442eba-ed28-4323-8160-89ab87ef4772 and chunk_id_96ab8bbc-7137-4af1-8739-f9b5d8b5e0f0).
revised_text: Apple's revenue has shown steady growth, increasing from $391,035,000,000 in fiscal year 2024 to $416,161,000,000 in fiscal year 2025, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 4.4%, as calculated from the respective revenue figures (chunk_id_35442eba-ed28-4323-8160-89ab87ef4772 and chunk_id_96ab8bbc-7137-4af1-8739-f9b5d8b5e0f0).
changes_summary: Revised the revenue figures to match the evidence and recalculated the CAGR to reflect the correct growth rate between fiscal years 2024 and 2025.
